# Purchase and Delivery

Digital gift cards are sent via email to the recipient within fifteen minutes after purchase, whereas physical gift cards are shipped as a standard parcel, adhering to regular delivery timelines. Additionally, gift cards can be scheduled for delivery on a future date, allowing for delivery up to a year in advance for occasions like birthdays and holidays.

[Source: gift_cards.md#purchase-and-delivery]
